---
description: "Sync a new requirement or external proposal into the target repo's spec hierarchy before implementation."
mode: "agent"
---

# Sync External Spec: {{input}}

1. Read the current spec hierarchy from `docs/ENVIRONMENT_PROFILE.md`.
2. Identify the affected spec documents.
3. Draft the spec update before any implementation.
4. Run the spec guardian on the intended changes.
5. Update `docs/SYSTEM_STATE.md`.
6. Hand off to `plan-feature`.
